form.title: Variant Calling (nf-core/sarek)
form.description: Perform variant calling on aligned sequence reads

workflow_version.title: Workflow Version
workflow_version.description: Version of nf-core/sarek to run (e.g. 3.8.1). See https://nf-co.re/sarek/releases for all releases.

analysis_type.title: Experiment Design
analysis_type.description: Indicate the analysis type (germline/somatic) and select high level parameters for the workflow.

genome_source.title: Reference Genome Source
genome_source.description: Select whether to use a curated iGenomes reference or a pre-built BWA genome index dataset from Cirro.

igenomes.title: Reference Genome (iGenomes)
igenomes.description: Select a curated reference genome from the iGenomes collection.

bwa_cirro_reference.title: Custom Genome Index (BWA)
bwa_cirro_reference.description: Select a pre-built BWA genome index dataset from Cirro. Variant annotation (VEP/snpEff) and GATK known-sites/germline resources are not available for custom genomes.

wes.title: Whole Exome/Targeted Gene Panel Assay
wes.description: Please indicate if your data was generated using a capture kit.

intervals.title: Genomic intervals
intervals.description: Target bed file in case of whole exome or targeted sequencing or intervals file for parallelization.

germline_resource.title: Germline resource
germline_resource.description: The germline resource VCF file (bgzipped and tabixed) needed by GATK4 Mutect2 is a collection of calls that are likely present in the sample, with allele frequencies.

tools.title: Germline variant calling tool(s)
tools.description: Please select one or more variant callers for your analysis.

tools.title: Somatic variant calling tool(s)
tools.description: Please select one or more variant callers for your analysis.

only_paired_variant_calling.title: Only paired variant calling
only_paired_variant_calling.description: Skip germline variant calling for matched normal samples; only perform tumor/normal somatic calling. Normal samples without a matched tumor are still processed through germline calling.

joint_mutect2.title: Joint calling with Mutect2
joint_mutect2.description: Runs Mutect2 in joint (multi-sample) mode for better concordance among variant calls of tumor samples from the same patient.

pon.title: Panel of Normals (Mutect2)
pon.description: Panel-of-normals VCF (bgzipped) for GATK Mutect2, used to filter recurrent technical artifacts. If omitted, Mutect2 runs without a PON and produces an unfiltered VCF.

ignore_soft_clipped_bases.title: Ignore soft-clipped bases
ignore_soft_clipped_bases.description: Do not analyze soft-clipped bases in the reads (passes --dont-use-soft-clipped-bases to GATK Mutect2).

joint_germline.title: Joint germline calling
joint_germline.description: Turn on joint germline variant calling for GATK HaplotypeCaller, using all normal germline samples together followed by VQSR filtering.

annotation.title: Variant Annotation
annotation.description: Select variant annotation tools and VEP plugins.

annotation_tool.title: Annotation tool(s)
annotation_tool.description: Please select one or both variant annotation tools.

vep_dbnsfp.title: dbNSFP plugin
vep_dbnsfp.description: Enable the use of the VEP dbNSFP plugin that retrieves data for missense variants.

vep_loftee.title: LOFTEE plugin
vep_loftee.description: Enable the use of the VEP LOFTEE plugin to identify LoF (loss-of-function) variation.

vep_spliceai.title: SpliceAI plugin
vep_spliceai.description: Enable the use of the VEP SpliceAI plugin to annotate variants predicted effect on splicing.

vep_spliceregion.title: SpliceRegion plugin
vep_spliceregion.description: Enable the use of the VEP SpliceRegion plugin to provide granular predictions of splicing effects.

vep_mastermind.title: Mastermind plugin
vep_mastermind.description: Enable the use of the VEP Mastermind plugin to retrieve genomic evidence citation counts for variants.

vep_condel.title: Condel plugin
vep_condel.description: Enable the use of the VEP Condel plugin to compute a Consensus Deleteriousness score for missense variants from SIFT and PolyPhen-2.

vep_phenotypes.title: Phenotypes plugin
vep_phenotypes.description: Enable the use of the VEP Phenotypes plugin to retrieve overlapping phenotype information from Ensembl.

vep_out_format.title: VEP output format
vep_out_format.description: Format of the VEP output file.

extra_params_json.title: Extra Parameters (JSON)
extra_params_json.description: Optional: provide additional workflow parameters as a JSON object (e.g. {"skip_markduplicates": true}). Parameters are validated against the nf-core/sarek schema for the selected workflow version — unrecognized keys are silently removed.
